appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Frontend (Svelte SPA)' section with isolation rules, key selectors, and testing tips

frictions: Token list API returns empty (no ALCHEMY_API_KEY) — worked around via URL params to pre-populate tokens for clear button testing
ThemeToggle button accessible name is 'Theme: system' (not obvious); required JS eval to discover
Had to add Uniswap tokenlist via Settings modal before autocomplete showed addresses for address font testing
